layout_and_format.frame_styling: thick black outer border, thin black dividers, white sans-serif footer text on black bar
layout_and_format.consistency_rule: same person, overhead bird-eye angle consistent across all frames, only hand gesture and expression vary

aesthetic_and_post.color_grading: deep red dominant, cool shadow tones, high contrast, slightly desaturated skin
